response:
sec. 1  
people allergic to peanuts cannot live underwater because their bodies lack the necessary proteins to process the allergen in a safe manner the human body requires specific enzymes to break down peanuts and the absence of these enzymes can lead to severe allergic reactions in the presence of water  

sec. 2  
the chemical composition of peanuts contains compounds that are not compatible with the biological systems of aquatic environments the breakdown of these compounds in water can alter their structure and make them more likely to trigger an immune response in individuals who are already allergic to peanuts
